data.body: 5977 GREEN: composer.py rejects whitespace-only titles on create+edit (strip() check, value stored verbatim), held-out from the corpus oracle. Full oracle 45/45: whitespace rejected across lib/cli/mcp w/ 'non-empty'; byte-identity corpus (leading-dash/quotes/backslash/LF/CRLF/emoji/non-BMP/NFC-vs-NFD-distinct/255-max) preserved; U+2192->'->' kept; >255 (incl 1000) rejected; NUL round-trips via lib+MCP. Added CLI help rule (create/edit help.txt, regenerated 4 byte-parity goldens), CHANGELOG breaking entry w/ back-out note. Pre-merge store scan: 0 whitespace-only titles -> no migration. Committing stacked on a263.
